_comment: Colorado trout hatch calendar — generalized; tweak per drainage as needed

1.name: January
1.notes: Tailwaters only. Deckers, Pueblo, Taylor. Slow nymphing.

2.name: February
2.notes: Midge clusters mid-day. Watch for cluster takes.

3.name: March
3.notes: Pre-runoff. BWO emerges 11am-3pm on cloudy days.

4.name: April
4.notes: Mother's Day Caddis builds on Arkansas late month.

5.name: May
5.notes: Mother's Day Caddis hatch peak on Arkansas. Runoff starts — fish before/after the rivers blow out.

6.name: June
6.notes: Runoff peak early month. Salmonflies on Colorado at Pumphouse, Gunnison gorge.

7.name: July
primary: Green Drake (#10-12) — Roaring Fork, Frying Pan
7.notes: Prime time. Green Drakes on Frying Pan are legendary.

10.name: October
10.notes: Brown trout spawn — avoid redds. Streamers and eggs.

11.name: November
11.notes: Tailwaters dominate. Big browns post-spawn, hungry.

12.name: December
12.notes: Tailwaters only. Slow drifts, long leaders, light tippet.
